sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Level 2 completed! Now on level 3. The new layout is different - it has a gray background with white columns at the bottom, and various colored blocks (green, purple, yellow, blue) on top of the white columns. Let me inspect the segmentation to understand the new layout.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Level 3 started. New layout with white columns at bottom.
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}, Step: {current_frame.step}")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nNodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

print(f"\nCurrent state: {state_graph.current}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
